author: y4rr
content: [result] Implemented EmbeddingBag module with Sum/Mean/Max reduction modes. Supports 1D input with explicit offsets (forward_bag) and 2D input where each row is a bag (Module::forward). Fused lookup+reduce avoids full intermediate embedding materialization. Exports EmbeddingBag and EmbeddingBagMode from ferrotorch-nn. Compiles clean.
